name: Frosted Chocolate Brownie Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the original recipe.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg whites one at a time, then stir in the sour cream, milk, vanilla extract, flour, baking powder, salt, and cocoa.
4. Spread the batter into a greased baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray.
5. Bake for the time specified in the original recipe or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before frosting with creamy chocolate frosting.
7. Serve and enjoy your Frosted Chocolate Brownie Supreme!
